name: Core AI Agent Governance Contract Skeleton
description: Skeleton contract for the governed AI actor boundary.
purpose: Defines the placeholder boundary for AI Agent identity, purpose, bounded role, and governance references without implementing an agent runtime.
appliesTo: Textual governed AI actor boundary only.
owns: AI Agent identity, purpose, bounded role, and governance-reference boundary.
nonGoals: AI model or prompt execution, agent runtime, orchestration, autonomous authority, or self-escalation.
Permission grants or evaluation, policy authoring or enforcement, human review decisions, or approval execution.
Service, API, workflow, event bus, database, Product UI, professional truth, legal conclusion, compliance decision, routing selection, filing, payment, sending, task completion, or state mutation.
Production data, restricted data, credentials, model or provider integration, RAG, vector stores, or AI infrastructure.
Duplicate Agent object schemas or Agent Registry implementation.

name: Core AI Agent Contract Skeleton
description: Skeleton contract for the mandatory Agent Contract boundary.
purpose: Defines the placeholder agreement for allowed and prohibited capabilities, authorized knowledge, access, outputs, risk, review, audit, failure, and consumers.
appliesTo: Textual mandatory Agent Contract boundary only.
nonGoals: AI model or prompt execution, agent runtime, orchestration, autonomous authority, or self-escalation.
Permission grants or evaluation, policy authoring or enforcement, human review decisions, or approval execution.
Service, API, workflow, event bus, database, Product UI, professional truth, legal conclusion, compliance decision, routing selection, filing, payment, sending, task completion, or state mutation.
Production data, restricted data, credentials, model or provider integration, RAG, vector stores, or AI infrastructure.
Executable authorization, service access enforcement, dynamic contract generation, or agent delegation runtime.

name: Core AI Capability Governance Contract Skeleton
description: Skeleton contract for declared AI assistance capability boundaries.
purpose: Defines capability eligibility and prohibited-capability boundaries under an Agent Contract without implying authorization.
appliesTo: Textual AI assistance capability boundary only.
owns: Declared AI capability eligibility and prohibited-capability boundary.
nonGoals: AI model or prompt execution, agent runtime, orchestration, autonomous authority, or self-escalation.
Permission grants or evaluation, policy authoring or enforcement, human review decisions, or approval execution.
Service, API, workflow, event bus, database, Product UI, professional truth, legal conclusion, compliance decision, routing selection, filing, payment, sending, task completion, or state mutation.
Production data, restricted data, credentials, model or provider integration, RAG, vector stores, or AI infrastructure.
Capability engines, tool execution, runtime authorization, marketplaces, scoring, or any implication that capability equals permission.

name: Core AI Output Governance Contract Skeleton

nonGoals: AI model or prompt execution, agent runtime, orchestration, autonomous authority, or self-escalation.
